mapper.select: select r.*, o.order_no from after_sale_record r left join demo_order o on r.order_id=o.id where r.id=#{id}
select r.*, o.order_no from after_sale_record r left join demo_order o on r.order_id=o.id where r.order_id=#{orderId} order by r.created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into after_sale_record(after_sale_no, order_id, service_type, reason, status, refund_amount, apply_at, handle_at, remark) values(#{afterSaleNo}, #{orderId}, #{serviceType}, #{reason}, coalesce(#{status}, 'APPLIED'), #{refundAmount}, coalesce(#{applyAt}, now()), #{handleAt}, #{remark})
